strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across software, hardware, and infrastructure with consistent technical depth and adaptability across languages and domains.
Proven AI-agent infrastructure contributions and builder fluency in cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, MCP frameworks) aligned with AI strategy needs.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding and sustaining GISCollective — an open-source AI-adjacent platform used by NGOs — mirroring startup-intrapreneurship in large orgs.
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent active technical engagement.
Lacks explicit mention of published AI/ML products or platforms — critical for preferred qualification on recognized AI expertise.
No advanced degree (Master’s/PhD) in AI-related field, though practical experience may compensate.
response.justification: Bogdan’s 15+ years of diverse, hands-on engineering across cloud, AI-agent infrastructure, and distributed systems — coupled with his founding of a real-world, open-source geospatial platform used by NGOs — strongly align with the role’s need for a strategic, builder-oriented leader who can identify and operationalize AI differentiation. His fluency in AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and agentic tooling, alongside proven ability to lead complex technical initiatives end-to-end, positions him as a high-upside candidate despite the absence of an advanced degree or recent employment.
